Status:
FINALIZED GOVERNED UX REFINEMENT EVIDENCE

HOMEPAGE_AND_AUDIT_REFINEMENT_EXECUTION_V1

## Evidence Summary

This evidence records the first governed Product 1 UX execution pressure-test.

The milestone formalizes bounded homepage and audit refinement semantics without changing runtime behavior, governance architecture, deployment flow, or frontend implementation.

## Finalized Scope

Finalized scope includes:

- homepage clarity refinement boundaries
- enterprise credibility refinement boundaries
- governance-visible UX evolution semantics
- audit readability philosophy
- deterministic runtime framing
- replay-safe evidence visibility
- anti-drift UI constraints
- Product 1 enterprise positioning continuity
